summary: reservesea (AeroParker) is a session-driven flow whose booking pages 302 through a chain that only settles once JSESSIONID/parkingReservationGuid/AWSALB cookies are carried across hops; the generated HTTP client is built with a nil cookie jar and redirect-loops, so it is given a real cookie jar.
reason: Without a cookie jar the generic client cannot hold the session cookie across the redirect chain and every hop re-requests anonymously until the 10-redirect cap; a cookie jar is inert for stateless APIs, so enabling it by default is safe and is required for any endpoint on this session site (including the live 'parking' page fetch).
validated_outcome: With the jar, 'parking' fetches the live booking page (200) and extracts title/description/links instead of erroring after 10 redirects.
